user.title: Wildberries Orders
user.description: Recommended: paste cookies JSON (works on all HA hosts). Phone login needs Playwright + Chromium on the HA host.

phone.title: Phone sign-in
phone.description: Headless Chromium runs once during setup (~15 s). Order polling uses no browser afterward.

cookies.title: Paste cookies
cookies.description: Export cookies from wildberries.ru (Cookie-Editor JSON or Playwright storage_state from wb_phone_login.py). Must include x_wbaas_token and marketplace token (WBTokenV3 or wbx__tokenData).

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Wildberries (antibot or network)
error.invalid_auth: Wildberries rejected the session — check cookies or sign in again
error.playwright_missing: Playwright is not available on this HA host — use cookies JSON or run scripts/wb_phone_login.py on your PC
error.chromium_install_failed: Could not download Chromium. HA host needs internet and ~300 MB free space
error.phone_login_failed: Login failed (antibot, wrong code, or rate limit — wait and retry)
